raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "cup",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "With claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "Laterally",
    "Precondition": "The cup is within the 5 cm claw capacity, its front and side surfaces are clear, and there is sufficient clearance for the right arm to approach from the front-right direction without colliding with either box.",
    "Postcondition": "The cup is securely held by the right end-effector and lifted a few centimetres above the tabletop, freeing the area directly in front of box_2."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "front-left area of the table (free space)",
    "Action concept": "Place",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "With claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "Vertically",
    "Precondition": "The robot is holding the cup and the designated front-left tabletop region is unobstructed and stable for placement.",
    "Postcondition": "The cup is placed safely on the front-left region of the table and released, clearing the manipulation zone in front of the boxes."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Push",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "Frontally",
    "Precondition": "With the cup removed, the front face of box_2 is fully accessible, and there is at least 40 cm of free space on the table in the forward direction to accommodate the push without the box falling off.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_2 is translated approximately 20 cm toward the front edge of the table, leaving the right side of box_1 completely unobstructed."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 4,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "Laterally",
    "Precondition": "Both the left and right sides of box_1 are clear after relocating box_2; the robot’s arms have unobstructed lateral access to simultaneously engage opposite sides of the 30 cm box; tabletop surface is stable for a brief lift.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_1 (the darker box) is securely held between the two end-effectors and lifted several centimetres off the table, satisfying the task requirement of picking up the darker box."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The cup is within the 5 cm claw capacity, its front and side surfaces are clear, and there is sufficient clearance for the right arm to approach from the front-right direction without colliding with either box.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The cup is securely held by the right end-effector and lifted a few centimetres above the tabletop, freeing the area directly in front of box_2.

parsed_json.Target: front-left area of the table (free space)
parsed_json.Precondition: The robot is holding the cup and the designated front-left tabletop region is unobstructed and stable for placement.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The cup is placed safely on the front-left region of the table and released, clearing the manipulation zone in front of the boxes.

parsed_json.Precondition: With the cup removed, the front face of box_2 is fully accessible, and there is at least 40 cm of free space on the table in the forward direction to accommodate the push without the box falling off.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_2 is translated approximately 20 cm toward the front edge of the table, leaving the right side of box_1 completely unobstructed.

parsed_json.Precondition: Both the left and right sides of box_1 are clear after relocating box_2; the robot’s arms have unobstructed lateral access to simultaneously engage opposite sides of the 30 cm box; tabletop surface is stable for a brief lift.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_1 (the darker box) is securely held between the two end-effectors and lifted several centimetres off the table, satisfying the task requirement of picking up the darker box.
